# ImagePlaygroundOptions.CreationVariety

**Enumeration**

An option for determining when the system should provide better variety when creating multiple images from the same set of concepts.

## Declaration

```swift
enum CreationVariety
```

## Overview

Use this type to configure the variety behavior of an `ImageCreator` instance.

## Enumeration Cases

- **ImagePlaygroundOptions.CreationVariety.automatic**: An option to choose the most appropriate creation variety behavior.
- **ImagePlaygroundOptions.CreationVariety.high**: An option to use high creation variety for all provided concepts.
- **ImagePlaygroundOptions.CreationVariety.low**: An option to use low creation variety for all provided concepts.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
